name: Woody Wallace
bio: Woody Wallace serves as the Trinity County Sheriff, overseeing law enforcement for Trinity County from the county seat of Groveton. Sheriff Wallace protects this rural East Texas community and the Lake Livingston shoreline areas within the county.
campaignPromises: Ensure public safety around Lake Livingston communities
Provide effective patrol coverage across the rural county
Combat property crime targeting vacant and seasonal properties
Maintain cooperation with Trinity River Authority law enforcement
Keep the county jail operating safely and within budget
